title: Mildly Roasted Syrian Squash Pilaf
description: A flavorful and fluffy one-pot dish featuring roasted squash, this Syrian pilaf is a delicious and egg-free friendly option for any meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the squash cubes with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
In a large pot, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the cumin and paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the basmati rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the roasted squash, chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is fluffy.
